        class DocumentInfo extends PObject implements Serializable

        • Serialized Fields

            Document currentDocument
          • documentGroup
            DocumentGroup documentGroup
          • locked

          • lockedBy

    • Package de.hallerweb.enterprise.prioritize.model.process

      • Class de.hallerweb.enterprise.prioritize.model.process.ProcessDefinition

        class ProcessDefinition extends PObject implements Serializable

        • Serialized Fields

          • deployedAt
            LocalDateTime deployedAt
            When the definition was last activated. Audit only.
          • deployedBy
            PUser deployedBy
            Who last activated it. Audit only.
          • deployedVersion
            Integer deployedVersion
            The
            invalid reference 
            document version
            that was deployed.
          • deploymentId
            String deploymentId
            Id of the Flowable deployment created by the last activation.
          • documentInfo
            DocumentInfo documentInfo
            The document carrying the BPMN source. Its current version is what activation deploys.
          • name
            String name
            Human-readable name, taken from the BPMN process name or the document name.
          • processKey
            String processKey
            The BPMN process id (<bpmn:process id="…">), unique across the platform. Read out of the document content on registration, never supplied by the caller: the file is the truth.

            The unique constraint is only the second line of defence — ddl-auto: update does not retrofit it onto an existing table, so the service checks for a collision explicitly.

          • state
            ProcessDefinitionState state
            Where this definition stands between registration and the engine.

    • Package de.hallerweb.enterprise.prioritize.model.project

      • Class de.hallerweb.enterprise.prioritize.model.project.Blackboard

        class Blackboard extends PObject implements Serializable

        • Serialized Fields

          • description
            String description
          • frozen
            boolean frozen
          • project
            Project project
            The project this blackboard belongs to (inverse side).
          • tasks
            List<Task> tasks
            Tasks on this blackboard. The owning side is
            invalid reference 
            Task#getBlackboard()
            .
          • title
            String title

      • Class de.hallerweb.enterprise.prioritize.model.project.Project

        class Project extends PObject implements Serializable

        • Serialized Fields

          • beginDate
            LocalDate beginDate
          • blackboard
            Blackboard blackboard
            The blackboard holding this project's tasks. Created together with the project.
          • description
            String description
          • documents
            Set<DocumentInfo> documents
            Documents assigned to this project.
          • dueDate
            LocalDate dueDate
          • goals
            List<ProjectGoal> goals
            Target goals pursued by this project. Owned by the project (unidirectional; the project_id foreign key lives on the goal table). A project's progress is derived from these goals and the tasks assigned to them.
          • manager
            PActor manager
            The actor (person or machine) responsible for this project.
          • maxManDays
            int maxManDays
            Maximum number of man-days this project is expected to consume.
          • members
            Set<PUser> members
            Users participating in this project.
          • name
            String name
          • priority
            int priority
          • requiredSkills
            Set<SkillGroup> requiredSkills
            Skills required to carry out this project.
          • resources
            Set<Resource> resources
            Resources assigned to this project.

      • Class de.hallerweb.enterprise.prioritize.model.project.Task

        class Task extends PObject implements Serializable

        • Serialized Fields

          • activeTimeSpan
            TimeSpan activeTimeSpan
            The currently running time-tracking span, or null when tracking is idle. On stop the span is closed and moved into Task.timeSpent.
          • assignee
            PActor assignee
            The actor currently responsible for this task; null if unassigned.
          • blackboard
            Blackboard blackboard
            The blackboard owning this task (owning side of the relation).
          • description
            String description
          • documents
            Set<Document> documents
            Documents attached to this task.
          • goal
            ProjectGoal goal
            The goal this task contributes to; null if the task is not tied to any goal. Tasks without a goal do not count towards project progress.
          • name
            String name
          • priority
            int priority
          • processInstanceId
            String processInstanceId
            Id of the BPMN process instance this task belongs to, or null when no process is involved. Deliberately a plain String and not a relation: the engine owns its instances, this is only a pointer into them, and the task keeps working exactly as before if Flowable is never used. The reverse direction — which task a running instance is about — is carried by the instance's business key and its taskId variable.
          • requiredSkills
            Set<SkillRecord> requiredSkills
            Skills required to carry out this task.
          • resources
            Set<Resource> resources
            Resources needed to carry out this task.
          • taskStatus
            TaskStatus taskStatus
          • timeSpent
            List<TimeSpan> timeSpent
            Completed time-tracking spans. Each entry is a closed TimeSpan of type TimeSpan.TimeSpanType.TIME_TRACKER. Owned by the task and stored via a task_id column. A List (not a Set) on purpose: a transient span's id-based hashCode would otherwise break removal from a hash-based collection.

    • Package de.hallerweb.enterprise.prioritize.model.project.goal

      • Class de.hallerweb.enterprise.prioritize.model.project.goal.ProjectGoal

        class ProjectGoal extends PObject implements Serializable

        • Serialized Fields

          • description
            String description
          • name
            String name
          • properties
            List<ProjectGoalProperty> properties
            Descriptive properties owned by this goal. Created and removed together with the goal (unidirectional; the goal_id foreign key lives on the property table).

      • Class de.hallerweb.enterprise.prioritize.model.project.goal.ProjectGoalProperty

        class ProjectGoalProperty extends PObject implements Serializable

        • Serialized Fields

          • description
            String description
          • name
            String name

      • Class de.hallerweb.enterprise.prioritize.model.project.goal.ProjectGoalPropertyDocument

        class ProjectGoalPropertyDocument extends ProjectGoalProperty implements Serializable

        • Serialized Fields

          • tag
            String tag
            Target tag a document should carry to satisfy this property.

      • Class de.hallerweb.enterprise.prioritize.model.project.goal.ProjectGoalPropertyNumeric

        class ProjectGoalPropertyNumeric extends ProjectGoalProperty implements Serializable

        • Serialized Fields

          • max
            double max
          • min
            double min

    • Package de.hallerweb.enterprise.prioritize.model.resource

      • Class de.hallerweb.enterprise.prioritize.model.resource.MqttCommand

        class MqttCommand extends PObject implements Serializable

        • Serialized Fields

          • description
            String description
            Optional human-readable description.
          • name
            String name
            Command identifier, unique per device (e.g. SET_BRIGHTNESS).
          • parameters
            Set<MqttCommandParameter> parameters

      • Class de.hallerweb.enterprise.prioritize.model.resource.MqttCommandParameter

        class MqttCommandParameter extends PObject implements Serializable

        • Serialized Fields

          • allowedValues
            Set<String> allowedValues
            Allowed values for MqttParameterType.ENUM; empty otherwise.
          • maxValue
            Double maxValue
            Inclusive upper bound for numeric types; null if unconstrained.
          • minValue
            Double minValue
            Inclusive lower bound for numeric types; null if unconstrained.
          • name
            String name
            Parameter name, unique within its command (e.g. level).
          • required
            boolean required
            Whether the caller must supply this parameter.
          • type
            MqttParameterType type
          • unit
            String unit
            Optional unit shown next to the value (e.g. %, °C).

      • Class de.hallerweb.enterprise.prioritize.model.resource.NameValueEntry

        class NameValueEntry extends PObject implements Serializable

        • Serialized Fields

          • mqttName
            String mqttName
          • mqttValues
            String mqttValues

      • Class de.hallerweb.enterprise.prioritize.model.resource.Resource

        class Resource extends PActor implements Serializable

        • Serialized Fields

          • agent
            Boolean agent
          • busy
            Boolean busy
          • busyBy
            PUser busyBy
          • currentOccupiedSlots
            Integer currentOccupiedSlots
          • department
            Department department
          • description
            String description
          • ip
            String ip
          • latitude
            String latitude
          • longitude
            String longitude
          • maxSlots
            Integer maxSlots
          • mqttCommands
            Set<MqttCommand> mqttCommands
          • mqttDataReceived
            byte[] mqttDataReceived
          • mqttDataReceiveTopic
            String mqttDataReceiveTopic
          • mqttDataSendTopic
            String mqttDataSendTopic
          • mqttDataToSend
            byte[] mqttDataToSend
          • mqttLastPing
            LocalDateTime mqttLastPing
          • mqttOnline
            Boolean mqttOnline
          • mqttResource
            Boolean mqttResource
          • mqttUUID
            String mqttUUID
          • mqttValues
            Set<NameValueEntry> mqttValues
          • name
            String name
          • nfcUnits
            List<NfcUnit> nfcUnits
            NFC tags mounted on this resource. Empty for resources that cannot be scanned (e.g. a printer or a training room). A List for the same reason as elsewhere: id-based hashCode of a still-transient child breaks hash-set removal.
          • port
            Integer port
          • remote
            Boolean remote
          • reservations
            Set<ResourceReservation> reservations
          • resourceGroup
            ResourceGroup resourceGroup
          • skills
            Set<SkillRecord> skills
          • stationary
            Boolean stationary

      • Class de.hallerweb.enterprise.prioritize.model.resource.ResourceGroup

        class ResourceGroup extends PObject implements Serializable

        • Serialized Fields

          • department
            Department department
          • name
            String name
          • resources
            Set<Resource> resources

    • Package de.hallerweb.enterprise.prioritize.model.scheduling

      • Class de.hallerweb.enterprise.prioritize.model.scheduling.TaskSchedule

        class TaskSchedule extends PObject implements Serializable

        • Serialized Fields

          • cronExpression
            String cronExpression
            Spring cron expression driving the cadence (6 fields: second minute hour day month weekday).
          • enabled
            boolean enabled
            Whether this schedule is active. Disabled schedules never fire and are skipped by the poller.
          • lastFiredAt
            LocalDateTime lastFiredAt
            When this schedule last produced a task; null until the first fire. Audit only.
          • name
            String name
            Human-readable name of the schedule itself (not of the tasks it produces).
          • nextFireAt
            LocalDateTime nextFireAt
            Pre-computed next due time, normalized to the server zone; null when the cron is exhausted.
          • project
            Project project
            The project whose blackboard receives the generated tasks.
          • taskDescription
            String taskDescription
            Description given to every generated task.
          • taskName
            String taskName
            Name given to every generated task.
          • taskPriority
            int taskPriority
            Priority given to every generated task.
          • zoneId
            String zoneId
            IANA zone id the cron is evaluated in (e.g. Europe/Berlin); server zone when blank.

    • Package de.hallerweb.enterprise.prioritize.model.security

      • Class de.hallerweb.enterprise.prioritize.model.security.PermissionRecord

        class PermissionRecord extends PObject implements Serializable

        • Serialized Fields

          • absoluteObjectType
            String absoluteObjectType
          • createPermission
            boolean createPermission
          • deletePermission
            boolean deletePermission
          • department
            Department department
          • objectId
            Long objectId
          • objectName
            String objectName
          • readPermission
            boolean readPermission
          • updatePermission
            boolean updatePermission

      • Class de.hallerweb.enterprise.prioritize.model.security.PUser

        class PUser extends PActor implements Serializable

        • Serialized Fields

          • active
            boolean active
          • address
            Address address
          • admin
            boolean admin
          • apiKey
            String apiKey
          • dateOfBirth
            LocalDateTime dateOfBirth
          • department
            Department department
          • email
            String email
          • firstname
            String firstname
          • gender
            PUser.Gender gender
          • lastLogin
            LocalDateTime lastLogin
          • name
            String name
          • occupation
            String occupation
          • password
            String password
          • personalPermissions
            Set<PermissionRecord> personalPermissions
          • roles
            Set<Role> roles
          • skills
            Set<SkillRecord> skills
          • username
            String username
            Login name, unique across all accounts — including deactivated ones, which keep their name because a delete only clears PUser.active. Enforced in UserService (case-insensitive, so Admin cannot shadow admin); the column constraint is the second line of defence and only reaches an existing database once its schema is regenerated.

      • Class de.hallerweb.enterprise.prioritize.model.security.Role

        class Role extends PObject implements Serializable

        • Serialized Fields

          • department
            Department department
          • description
            String description
          • name
            String name
          • permissions
            Set<PermissionRecord> permissions
          • users
            Set<PUser> users

    • Package de.hallerweb.enterprise.prioritize.model.telemetry

      • Class de.hallerweb.enterprise.prioritize.model.telemetry.TelemetryRule

        class TelemetryRule extends PObject implements Serializable

        • Serialized Fields

          • datapoint
            String datapoint
            Name of the watched data point (matches NameValueEntry.mqttName, e.g. temp).
          • enabled
            boolean enabled
            Whether this rule is evaluated at all.
          • hysteresis
            Double hysteresis
            Dead-band applied on the clearing flank to avoid chatter; null/0 disables it.
          • lastTransitionAt
            LocalDateTime lastTransitionAt
            When TelemetryRule.state last changed.
          • operator
            TelemetryOperator operator
            Comparison applied to the incoming value.
          • resource
            Resource resource
            Resource whose telemetry this rule watches.
          • severity
            Severity severity
            Severity carried on the fired event.
          • state
            TelemetryState state
            Persisted evaluation state; the rule fires only when this changes.
          • threshold
            Double threshold
            Primary threshold; for TelemetryOperator.RANGE the lower bound of the acceptable band.
          • thresholdHigh
            Double thresholdHigh
            Upper bound of the acceptable band; only used by TelemetryOperator.RANGE.
